name: Dead upwind
description: Wind blowing directly from destination toward start — forces tacking decision

name: Dead downwind
description: Wind blowing directly from behind the desired course — forces gybing decision

name: Beam reach
description: Wind perpendicular to course — should sail direct, no tacking

name: Wind shift mid-route
description: Wind direction changes partway — engine should re-evaluate and switch tack

name: Current pushing across
description: Tidal current angled across direct course — engine should crab into current
